feed.title: They Said So — Quote & Verse of the Day
feed.subtitle: Daily quotes across categories (inspire, life, love, art, management, sports, funny, nature) plus a daily Bible verse from theysaidso.com.

entry.title: We, Equality 7-2521, were not happy in those year in the Home of the Students. It was not that the learning was too hard for us. It was that the learning was too easy. This is a great sin, to be born with a head which is too quick. It is not good to be different from our brothers, but it is evil to
entry.content: We, Equality 7-2521, were not happy in those year in the Home of the Students. It was not that the learning was too hard for us. It was that the learning was too easy. This is a great sin, to be born with a head which is too quick. It is not good to be different from our brothers, but it is evil to be superior to them. The Teachers told us so, and they frowned when they looked at us. - Ayn Rand
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: To draw, you must close your eyes and sing. - Pablo Picasso
entry.content: To draw, you must close your eyes and sing. - Pablo Picasso
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: Boy is my wife stupid. It takes her and hour and a half to watch 60 minutes. My daughters no bargain either. In public school she was voted most likely to conceive. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: Boy is my wife stupid. It takes her and hour and a half to watch 60 minutes. My daughters no bargain either. In public school she was voted most likely to conceive. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Love is the most important thing in the world, but baseball is pretty good, too. - Yogi Berra
entry.content: Love is the most important thing in the world, but baseball is pretty good, too. - Yogi Berra
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: Great leaders are pragmatists who can deal with difficult realities but still have the optimism and courage to act. - Nitin Nohria
entry.content: Great leaders are pragmatists who can deal with difficult realities but still have the optimism and courage to act. - Nitin Nohria
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: About all you can do in life is be who you are. Some people will love you for you. Most will love you for what you can do for them, and some won't like you at all. - Rita Mae Brown
entry.content: About all you can do in life is be who you are. Some people will love you for you. Most will love you for what you can do for them, and some won't like you at all. - Rita Mae Brown
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you've imagined. As you simplify your life, the laws of the universe will be simpler. - Henry David Thoreau
entry.content: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you've imagined. As you simplify your life, the laws of the universe will be simpler. - Henry David Thoreau
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: Let our advance worrying become advance thinking and planning. - Winston Churchill
entry.content: Let our advance worrying become advance thinking and planning. - Winston Churchill
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morr
entry.content: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morrison
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson
entry.content: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros
entry.content: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell
entry.content: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey
entry.content: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein
entry.content: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman
entry.content: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson
entry.content: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz
entry.content: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty
entry.content: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger
entry.content: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton
entry.content: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann
entry.content: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc
entry.content: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson
entry.content: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin
entry.content: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell
entry.content: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie
entry.content: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain
entry.content: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius
entry.content: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis
entry.content: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis
entry.dc:creator: Inspire

entry.title: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
entry.content: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
entry.dc:creator: Students

entry.title: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert
entry.content: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert
entry.dc:creator: Art

entry.title: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.content: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entry.dc:creator: Funny

entry.title: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron
entry.content: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron
entry.dc:creator: Sports

entry.title: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature,
entry.content: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature, would rather try to persuade a man to go along, because once I have persuaded him, he will stick. If I scare him, he will stay just as long as he is scared, and then he is gone. - Dwight David Eisenhower
entry.dc:creator: Management

entry.title: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh
entry.content: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh
entry.dc:creator: Love

entry.title: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery
entry.content: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery
entry.dc:creator: Life

entry.title: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
entry.content: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
entry.dc:creator: Inspire
